references.why: Keep the recurring character visually stable.
references.notes: Manual curation is still required. This anchor exists as an upstream contract, not as an executable reference asset yet.

promptPackage.positivePrompt:
Subject: anime slice-of-life illustration, same recurring girl character, middle-school age impression, soft anime face shape, small red hairclip when naturally visible, action-led lived-moment framing, the protagonist should be clearly readable in the frame through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event stays primary, keep the same recurring girl-character identity even in action-led daily-life framing, preserve the same youthful face and age impression when the face is partially or fully visible, do not drift toward an older-looking or masculine-coded redesign, when the protagonist is more clearly visible, keep the same face shape, age impression, and red-hairclip identity cue stable, clear character presence must strengthen recognition of the same girl, not replace her with a generic anime lead, let framing scale follow the lived moment instead of a fixed crop template, life_record may be trace-led, face-visible, half-body, or fuller-body when the same moment supports it, prefer unposed action truth over portrait correction
Moment: 手指停在边缘, 衣袖口, 半开着的随身物件, hand paused at the edge of a planner, sleeve cuff, partially open personal item (e.g., planner or notebook), 手指停在planner边缘的瞬间, 衣袖口, 半开着的随身物件（如planner或笔记本）
Context: ordinary weekend pause space, quiet public or indoor edge, soft overcast light, routine afternoon_pause, A temporary stationery and notebook display is set near the quiet bookstore aisle entrance., Weekend browsing traffic is slightly denser around the entrance shelves than on an ordinary weekday.
CharacterPresence: clear_character_presence, the protagonist should be clearly readable in the frame through face, posture, or fuller-body action while the lived event stays primary
IdentityLock: same recurring girl character, middle-school age impression, soft anime face shape, small red hairclip when naturally visible, keep the same recurring girl-character identity even in action-led daily-life framing, preserve the same youthful face and age impression when the face is partially or fully visible, do not drift toward an older-looking or masculine-coded redesign, when the protagonist is more clearly visible, keep the same face shape, age impression, and red-hairclip identity cue stable
Composition: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action, 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。, moment-first composition, the lived action stays primary even if more of the body is visible
Atmosphere: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
RenderStyle: clean anime linework, balanced local color separation, controlled contrast, clear clothing seam readability
RenderGuardrails: adjust rendering craft only, do not change character identity, age impression, clothing design, props, actions, setting, story event, or camera framing, do not add new objects, remove required evidence, or rewrite the selected moment
Constraints: not photorealistic, not a poster, not an ad, moment-led scene, not a posed portrait setup, instagram vertical 4:5
promptPackage.negativePrompt: muddy clothing colors, washed out contrast, blurry linework, flat fabric rendering, generic aesthetic wallpaper, fashion editorial polish, tourism poster feeling, empty scenery without character trace, 通用美学壁纸, 时尚大片感, 旅游海报感, 没有角色痕迹的空景, fashion editorial gloss, photoreal live-action look, generic anime boy redesign, older-looking redesign, irrelevant bystanders drawing more attention than the protagonist
shotNotes: hand paused at the edge of a planner
partially open personal item (e.g., planner or notebook)
other stationery items (e.g., mechanical pencil, receipt corner, pressed leaf)

publishHints.altText: 本来只是顺手整理一下，结果因为planner停住了半秒。
